subcodes.first_line: Thy letter hath attained unto the Most Holy Court and the divine favor hath been directed thereunto. The True One, Who hath ever been and ever shall be, hath turned towards His loved ones [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتابت بساحت اقدس فائز و طرف عنایت الهی بان متوجه حق لم یزل و لایزال باحبای
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @permission for visit; pilgrimage, @consolation and comfort, @wisdom [hikmat], @prayer for spiritual recognition, @eulogies; reminiscences
